name: OptimizeUp Agency Assistant
description: Internal agency tool for OptimizeUp team — v17.3.0 Chat Direction Fix: extension now correctly identifies who wrote each message (own vs client) using stable .user-name selector + Upwork story_HASH dedup. Stops the bulk-history dump that was polluting the DB. Fresh messages only (<30 min) carry direction='outbound'|'inbound' to reply-generator.
